events.title: Fins & Brushes
events.description: Local artists set up easels throughout the National Aquarium to paint live underwater scenes for ticketed guests.

events.title: Star-Spangled Sunrise Walk
events.description: A guided dawn hike around Fort McHenry's star-shaped ramparts with a ranger-led reading of Francis Scott Key's original poem.

events.title: Art After Hours: Creative Professionals Mixer
events.description: Baltimore's creative industry gathers at the BMA for an evening of wine, gallery access, and curated networking among artists and designers.

events.title: Walters After Dark: Medieval & Modern
events.description: A ticketed evening blending live medieval music performances with guided tours of the Walters' ancient armor and manuscript collections.

events.title: Opening Day Block Party
events.description: Fans gather outside Camden Yards for a free pre-game street festival with food trucks, live music, and Orioles memorabilia vendors.

events.title: Purple Friday Fest
events.description: Ravens fans take over the M&T Bank Stadium plaza for a mid-season celebration with food, giveaways, and former player appearances.

events.title: Visionary Voices Open Call
events.description: The American Visionary Art Museum hosts an open submission showcase spotlighting self-taught and outsider artists from the Mid-Atlantic region.

events.title: Science After School Family Night
events.description: The Maryland Science Center opens its doors on Friday evenings for hands-on STEM activities, planetarium shows, and family-friendly fun.

events.title: All Aboard: Heritage Rail Festival
events.description: The B&O Railroad Museum transforms into a multi-day festival with train rides, model railroad competitions, and vintage rail photography exhibits.

events.title: Wild Encounters: Zoo Run at Dawn
events.description: An early-morning 5K through the Maryland Zoo's grounds with animal sightings along the route and a post-race breakfast near the penguin exhibit.

events.title: Federal Hill Flavor Crawl
events.description: A self-guided tasting tour of Federal Hill's best restaurants, anchored by a sunset gathering at the park's overlook with local craft beers.

events.title: Patterson Park Porch Sessions
events.description: An outdoor acoustic music series staged at Patterson Park's pagoda, featuring Baltimore singer-songwriters every Sunday through summer.

events.title: Druid Hill Disco & Picnic
events.description: A free community picnic in Druid Hill Park with a DJ spinning classic funk and soul, lawn games, and a local food truck lineup.

events.title: Marble Steps Stand-Up
events.description: Baltimore comedians perform short sets on the steps of the Washington Monument as part of a free outdoor summer comedy series.

events.title: Tell-Tale Readings: Poe After Dark
events.description: Actors perform dramatic readings of Poe's most chilling works by candlelight inside the restored rooms of his Baltimore home.

events.title: Little Inventors Showcase
events.description: Port Discovery hosts a family inventor fair where kids present original creations built during a six-week after-school design challenge.

events.title: Black Founders Summit Baltimore
events.description: The Reginald F. Lewis Museum hosts a full-day summit connecting Black entrepreneurs with investors, mentors, and business resources across Maryland.

events.title: Crab & Craft: Inner Harbor Throwdown
events.description: Maryland's top crab cake chefs compete for the harbor's best title while attendees sample entries paired with local craft brewery tastings.

events.title: Lexington Market Eats & Beats
events.description: A Thursday evening market activation pairing Lexington Market's iconic vendors with live R&B performances and a curated local spirits bar.

events.title: Fells Point Live: Waterfront Sessions
events.description: A summer concert series along the Fells Point waterfront featuring local blues, jazz, and indie acts performing on a floating stage.

events.title: Annapolis Dockside Days
events.description: Annapolis City Dock comes alive with a weekend maritime festival of skipjack races, seafood vendors, and live nautical folk music.

events.title: Bay Stewards Volunteer Day
events.description: The Annapolis Maritime Museum organizes a community oyster reef restoration and waterway cleanup event open to all ages.

events.title: Capital City Creatives Meetup
events.description: Annapolis tourism professionals, designers, and hospitality leaders connect over cocktails at a monthly rooftop networking hour downtown.

events.title: Creek & Canvas Plein Air Day
events.description: Artists and outdoor enthusiasts gather along Carroll Creek in Frederick for a guided plein air painting session followed by a group gallery walk.

events.title: Healing & History: Civil War Medicine Exhibition Night
events.description: A ticketed evening at the National Museum of Civil War Medicine featuring dramatic re-enactors, period music, and a special curator-led tour.
events.location_name: National Museum of Civil War Medicine

events.title: Fourth Dimension Laugh Factory
events.description: A Friday night stand-up comedy showcase at Frederick's Fourth Dimension Fun Center, pairing local comics with bowling lanes and craft cocktails.

events.title: Battlefield at Dawn: Gettysburg Sunrise Tour
events.description: A small-group guided walk through Gettysburg National Military Park at sunrise, tracing the movements of the first day's fighting.

events.title: Lights, History, Action!
events.description: The Gettysburg Diorama hosts a community twilight event where local students narrate the battle sequence live to visiting families.

events.title: Ghost Lantern Walk
events.description: Ghostly Images of Gettysburg leads a lantern-lit Halloween festival through the borough's most haunted sites with costumed storytellers at every stop.

events.title: Nature Journaling in the Glen
events.description: Robinson Nature Center in Columbia hosts a guided outdoor sketching and nature journaling workshop along its wooded Patuxent River trails.

events.title: Cascade Plunge Challenge
events.description: An annual cold-water hike to Cascade Falls in Patapsco Valley State Park ending in a voluntary waterfall plunge for charity.

events.title: WellSpan Park Summer Sounds
events.description: York's minor league ballpark hosts a post-game concert series on the outfield grass, featuring regional country and rock acts all summer long.

events.title: York Founders & Funders Breakfast
events.description: York County History Center hosts a monthly early-morning meetup connecting local startups with regional investors over curated programming.

events.title: Rivers Converge: Harpers Ferry Heritage Day
events.description: A free community history day at Harpers Ferry National Historical Park with ranger programs, abolitionist history talks, and river kayaking demos.

events.title: Fort Fire: Living History Night
events.description: John Brown's Fort comes alive at night with costumed actors, fire performers, and dramatic readings from the 1859 raid's primary source accounts.

events.title: Fossil Hunters Field Day
events.description: A guided fossil-hunting expedition along the Calvert Cliffs shoreline led by a paleontologist, with a shark tooth identification station at the trailhead.

events.title: Bay Bridge Glow: Terrapin Sunset Festival
events.description: Terrapin Nature Park hosts an evening festival on Kent Island with local food vendors, live acoustic sets, and a prime Bay Bridge light show view.

events.title: Owl & Hawk Night Hike
events.description: Harford Glen Park hosts a naturalist-led nocturnal wildlife hike spotlighting the park's resident raptors and native nighttime ecosystem.

events.title: Mansion & Martinis: Harford County Professionals Night
events.description: The Liriodendron Mansion opens its elegant grounds for a quarterly after-hours networking event drawing Harford County's business community.

events.title: Midshipmen & Neighbors: Navy Open Day
events.description: The US Naval Academy welcomes the Annapolis community for an open campus day with guided tours, live performances by the Navy Band, and a family fun zone.

events.title: Founder Thursdays: Baltimore Builder Sessions
events.description: Spark Coworking opens its doors weekly for founders to co-work, swap pitches, and connect with Techstars mentors in a focused, community-driven environment.

events.title: Deep Tech Demo Night at FastForward
events.description: Johns Hopkins researchers and startup teams present early-stage life science and AI ventures to a curated audience of investors and industry partners.

events.title: Cyber Futures Summit at bwtech@UMBC
events.description: Maryland's premier cybersecurity research park hosts a day of expert panels, startup showcases, and federal agency briefings on emerging threat landscapes.

events.title: ETC Launch Pad: Baltimore Startup Pitch Competition
events.description: Early-stage companies at the Emerging Technology Centers compete for seed funding and mentorship in a live pitch event open to the public.

events.title: Impact x Innovation: Social Tech Hackathon
events.description: Impact Hub Baltimore hosts a weekend hackathon challenging civic tech teams to build solutions for Baltimore's most pressing community challenges.

events.title: Midnight at the Museum
events.description: An after-hours cultural experience featuring guided gallery walks, live storytelling, and interactive exhibits from local artists and historians.

events.title: City Canvas Festival
events.description: A public arts event where muralists, painters, and installation artists transform open spaces into a living creative showcase.

events.title: Voices of Heritage
events.description: A celebration of cultural traditions through folk performances, spoken word, craft displays, and regional food experiences.

events.title: Indie Film & Arts Night
events.description: A community gathering that screens short independent films alongside photography, sculpture, and mixed-media exhibitions.

events.title: Poetry Under Lanterns
events.description: An intimate evening of poetry readings, acoustic ambiance, and cultural performances set in a lantern-lit outdoor venue.

events.title: Laugh Track Live
events.description: A stand-up comedy showcase featuring rising local comics and a headline performer delivering sharp, crowd-pleasing sets.

events.title: Roast Night Revival
events.description: A playful comedy event where performers roast everyday topics, pop culture, and audience-submitted prompts.

events.title: Improv After Dark
events.description: A fast-paced improv show packed with unscripted sketches, audience participation, and absurd on-the-spot humor.

events.title: Office Chaos Comedy Hour
events.description: A themed stand-up night built around workplace humor, awkward meetings, and the strange rituals of modern employment.

events.title: Mics & Mischief
events.description: An open mic comedy event where new and experienced comedians test fresh material in a casual, high-energy setting.

events.title: Neon Nights Concert
events.description: A live music event featuring electronic, pop, and synth-driven performances with immersive lighting and visuals.

events.title: Soul & Strings Session
events.description: An evening of soulful vocals and live string arrangements blending contemporary songs with rich acoustic textures.

events.title: Riverfront Jazz Evening
events.description: A relaxed outdoor music event where jazz ensembles perform classic standards and modern improvisational pieces by the water.

events.title: Indie Pulse Live
events.description: A showcase of independent bands and singer-songwriters performing original tracks in an intimate venue.

events.title: Bassline Bazaar
events.description: A high-energy music gathering centered on DJs, dance beats, and a festival atmosphere with food and art vendors.

events.title: Bhool Bhulaiya Nights
events.description: A lantern-lit evening festival at Bara Imambara where storytellers guide groups through the famous labyrinth while Awadhi qawwali echoes through the vaulted halls.

events.title: Palace of Lights: Heritage Art Walk
events.description: Artists and calligraphers set up live demonstrations inside Chota Imambara's illuminated courtyards, celebrating the Nawabi tradition of decorative arts.

events.title: Tanga Tales: Old City Heritage Walk
events.description: A guided horse-carriage and walking tour starting at Rumi Darwaza, weaving through Old Lucknow's monuments with a local historian as narrator.

events.title: Ganj Gourmet: Hazratganj Street Food Trail
events.description: A curated evening food crawl through Hazratganj's iconic cafés and street vendors, celebrating Lucknow's famous chaat, kebabs, and Roomali roti culture.

events.title: Wild Lucknow: Zoo Dawn Walk
events.description: An early-morning guided wildlife walk through the Nawab Wajid Ali Shah Zoological Garden before crowds arrive, paired with a nature sketching session.

events.title: Samta Sandesh: Constitution Day Gathering
events.description: A public lecture series and community fair at the Ambedkar Memorial celebrating Dr. Ambedkar's legacy with youth debates, art installations, and social justice exhibitions.

events.title: Gomti Sunrise Cycling Rally
events.description: Janeshwar Mishra Park hosts a city-wide cycling rally at dawn, with participants riding a scenic loop around the lake before a community breakfast on the lawns.

events.title: Chatori Showdown: Street Food Cook-Off
events.description: Vendors at Chatori Gali compete for the title of Lucknow's best street bite, with public voting on golgappe, tikki, momos, and fusion chaats.

events.title: 1857 After Dark: Residency Light & Sound
events.description: A dramatic open-air light-and-sound show staged in the ruins of The Residency, narrating the 1857 uprising through projected visuals and live actor voices.

events.title: Mall Stage: Lucknow Indie Showcase
events.description: Fun Republic Mall's atrium transforms into a live music stage for an evening of original indie, folk, and fusion performances by Lucknow's emerging artists.
events.location_name: Nawab Wajid Ali Shah Zoological Garden

events.title: Into the Wild: Kukrail Forest Trek
events.description: A naturalist-led weekend trek through Kukrail Forest Reserve with birdwatching stops, crocodile conservation talks, and a forest photography challenge.

events.title: Gomti Utsav: Riverfront Cultural Fair
events.description: A weekend festival along Gomti Riverfront Park with folk dance performances, craft stalls, local food courts, and a floating diya ceremony at dusk.

events.title: Artifacts & Archaeology: Museum Discovery Workshop
events.description: The State Museum hosts an interactive workshop for students and curious adults, exploring Awadh's archaeological finds and the story of its 3,000-year-old Egyptian mummy.

events.title: Lulu Founders Meetup
events.description: Lucknow's startup and retail community gathers at Lulu Mall for a monthly evening networking session with investor pitches, brand showcases, and panel discussions.

events.title: Lucknow Mahotsav Opening Night
events.description: Indira Gandhi Pratishthan hosts the grand opening gala of Lucknow's annual cultural festival, featuring classical Kathak, Hindustani music, and Nawabi cuisine.

events.title: Under the Chhatris: Nawabi Architecture Sketch Jam
events.description: Artists gather outside Chhatar Manzil for a guided plein air sketching session focused on the palace's iconic umbrella domes and Indo-European facades.

events.title: Marine Drive After Hours
events.description: Lucknow's answer to Mumbai's promenade comes alive with a curated evening of street performers, pop-up food stalls, and a DJ set along the Gomti waterfront.

events.title: Chikankari Live: Embroidery Masterclass
events.description: Master artisans from Aminabad Market lead a hands-on Chikankari embroidery workshop, teaching Lucknow's signature needlework craft to participants of all skill levels.

events.title: Ghantaghar Gathering: Heritage Clock Festival
events.description: The Hussainabad Clock Tower area hosts a monthly heritage fair with antique markets, Urdu poetry readings, and guided walks through Lucknow's old city precinct.

events.title: Eco Garden Yoga & Wellness Morning
events.description: A community wellness event at Eco Garden with group yoga sessions, meditation circles, and a zero-waste picnic bringing together Lucknow's health-conscious crowd.
